title: Damages for removal of solid minerals
doc_html:
§13.  Damages for removal of solid minerals

A landowner may recover damages for the unauthorized removal from his land by any means of minerals occurring naturally in a solid state.

Acts 1974, No. 50, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§13.  Damages for removal of solid minerals
A landowner may recover damages for the unauthorized removal from his land by any means of minerals occurring naturally in a solid state.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
